summary: Comprehensive testing of Melus AI V2 features completed successfully. All requested features verified: admin login, 12 templates displayed, Ultra Mode (2x pricing), Debug Agent at 30 credits, version system, and ZIP download all working correctly.

issues: Minor ESLint warnings about missing useEffect dependencies (non-blocking)

seed_data_creation: Test workspaces created with TEST_ prefix during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V2 features tested and working: 1) Admin login works with provided credentials, 2) Generator page at /generator shows all 12 templates correctly, 3) Ultra Mode toggle doubles pricing (e.g., E-Commerce 450→900 credits), 4) Agent costs API returns debugger=30 credits (updated from 50), 5) ZIP download endpoint works, 6) Workspace versioning system works, 7) Debug endpoint validates workspace_id. Backend pytest covers: health check, admin login, agent costs, 12 templates verification, template details, Ultra Mode calculation, workspace creation, version history, ZIP download, debug endpoint validation, generation endpoints.
